summary: Mixed performance with missing favorites; no clear info on recording quality
review: The reviewer gave the tape four stars, appreciating that it captured Jerry Garcia’s later‑year playing, but lamented that many of their favorite songs were omitted and the show wasn’t a “beast.” No details about sound quality or source were provided, leaving the technical side uncertain.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; positive star rating but comments indicate disappointment with setlist and no recording‑quality details.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on clarity, mix, or source type; only mentions that the tape was taken by a taper.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer felt the concert wasn’t a ‘beast’ and noted many favorite songs were missing, suggesting a less satisfying set for them.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentions enjoying recordings from Jerry’s later years but no specific performance notes.
